final:
module shift_register (
    input reset_clk,
    input rst,
    input load,
    input shift,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    always @(posedge reset_clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 8'b0;
        end else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end else if (shift) begin
            data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[7:1]};
        end
    end
endmodule
